nasb.text: “Sit silently, and go into darkness, O daughter of the Chaldeans, For you will no longer be called The queen of kingdoms.

esv.text: Sit in silence, and go into darkness, O daughter of the Chaldeans; for you shall no more be called the mistress of kingdoms.

cnv.text: “迦勒底的女子啊！ 你要靜靜坐下，進到黑暗中去， 因為人不再稱你為列國之后了。

ccb.text: “迦勒底的姑娘啊， 要静静地坐着，进入黑暗中， 因为你不再被称为列国之后。

csbs.text: “迦勒底女子啊， 你要默然静坐，进入黑暗！ 因为人必不再称你为列国的王后了。
